particulars.description: Land at the rear of the supermarket, high street, tonbridge TN9 1EE as is more particularly described in a transfer of part dated 22 december 2023 from tonbridge 76 limited (1) in favour of 78C high street tonbridge LTD (2) and being transferred out of the title registered at the land registry with title number K351977.
